name: Cullerton Deuces
description: Cullerton Deuces is a Chicago street gang that started as a faction of the Morgan Deuces in the late 1960s in the Marshall Square area. Originally aligned with People Nation and the Latin Kings, the gang flipped to Folks Nation in 1994 under the Insane family with assistance from Insane Deuces and Spanish Cobras. The gang inducted a highly active wave of members in 1980 and has had a complex history of rivalries including wars with Satan Disciples, Two Two Boys, and later the Latin Kings.
